headline: Can PayPal Beat Its Q2 FY26 Expectations Amid Tougher Trends?
summary: PYPL faces a tougher Q2 after a solid Q1, with slower branded checkout trends testing whether it can meet guidance and sustain investor confidence.

headline: Goldman Sachs Raises PayPal (PYPL) Price Target
summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:PYPL) is one of the 10 Most Promising Fintech Stocks to Buy Now. On July 9, Goldman Sachs raised its price target on PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:PYPL) from $41 to $48 and maintained its Sell rating on the stock. In a research note, the firm said that the payments sector is relatively […]

headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks with Warning Signs
summary: While strong cash flow is a key indicator of stability, it doesn’t always translate to superior returns. Some cash-heavy businesses struggle with inefficient spending, slowing demand, or weak competitive positioning.
